title: delphinium potaninii var. potaninii
intro: Delphinium potaninii var. potaninii, also known as Potanin's delphinium, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Ranunculaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues. The plant's roots and flowers are believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antipyretic properties, which can help alleviate symptoms such as coughs, colds, and sore throats, providing relief from respiratory problems and promoting overall health. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's roots and flowers are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
